messages.text: Telegram never shared a single private message with anyone, including government and intelligence services. If authorities demand access, I would rather shut Telegram down in that country.

If you want to reach your full potential and maintain clarity of mind, stay away from addictive substances. My success and health are the result of 20+ years of complete abstinence from alcohol, tobacco, coffee, pills, and illegal drugs.
I don't think a phone is a necessary device. I hated the idea of being disturbed at any moment. My philosophy: I want to define what is important in my life, not let others define it for me.
We are running out of time to save the free internet built for us by our fathers. Our generation has a responsibility to protect it from those who want to control and censor it.
We are prepared to leave markets that aren't compatible with our principles, because we are not doing this for money. We are doing this for the mission.
Telegram is not a tool for criminals. We take down millions of harmful posts and channels every day. But we will never become a surveillance tool for governments.
My brother Nikolai is a unique prodigy — probably one in a billion. He had an enormous influence on my education and how I think about technology and mathematics.
I left Russia in 2014 with one bag and $10,000 cash. I had no plan, no backup. Just the belief that if you stand for principles, the universe finds a way.

The charges against me in France are based on a misunderstanding of how internet platforms work. If you hold a CEO personally responsible for every user action, you make it impossible to build anything.
I'm turning 41, but I don't feel like celebrating. The situation with freedom of speech globally is the worst I've seen in my lifetime. But I'm not giving up.
TON blockchain gives users true ownership of their digital assets. No company, no government can take away what belongs to you on the blockchain.
Telegram has 1 billion users because we focused on the user, not on monetization. The moment you start optimizing for revenue over experience, you lose what makes you special.
I sleep 8 hours a day, exercise daily, eat minimally. People think success requires suffering. I think it requires clarity. Clarity requires discipline.
I think AI will fundamentally change humanity. But I'm more worried about who controls it than about what it can do. Centralized AI is just another form of centralized power.
I don't have a permanent home. I live in different countries. Some people see this as a weakness. I see it as freedom. The ability to leave is the ultimate freedom.
I started VKontakte at 22 with no money and no connections. I just had a clear vision and the stubbornness to execute it. Most people give up too early.
Neutrality is not the same as cowardice. Telegram's neutrality has allowed us to serve people on all sides of every conflict, providing a lifeline for those who need information.
Encryption is not a feature — it's a human right. Anyone who wants to weaken encryption is either naive about security or has interests that conflict with users.
I think about death sometimes. Not with fear, but with clarity. It makes you ask: what am I actually spending my time on? Is it worth it?
The problem with most organizations is that they optimize for survival rather than mission. Once survival becomes the goal, the mission dies. We try to keep the mission alive at Telegram.
